scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.container:test: podman exec -it soulflow-orchestrator npx vitest run
scripts.container:test:pty: podman exec -it soulflow-orchestrator npx vitest run tests/agent/pty/
scripts.container:login:codex: podman run --rm -it -p 1455:1456 -v next_cli-auth-codex:/root/.codex -v ./scripts/oauth-relay.mjs:/tmp/relay.mjs:ro next-orchestrator bash -c "node /tmp/relay.mjs 1456 1455 & codex auth login"
scripts.container:login:claude: podman run --rm -it -v next_cli-auth-claude:/root/.claude next-orchestrator claude login
scripts.container:login:gemini: podman run --rm -it -v next_cli-auth-gemini:/root/.gemini next-orchestrator gemini auth login
